name: family_a_mvp_governance_v1
objective: Run an internal walkthrough with operators and reviewers to verify end-to-end workflow usability before external handoff.
agenda: Artifact readiness review (model, calibration, recommendations, execution templates)
Live CLI walkthrough from recommendation generation to campaign analysis
required_artifacts: Latest model card and calibration report
Campaign analysis and failure-mode analysis reports
Determinism report and environment lock snapshot
checklist: Nominate owner + backup operator for every critical workflow stage
Capture unresolved usability issues and classify by severity
Record decision on readiness for independent lab operation
Schedule follow-up remediation sprint for unresolved blockers

in_progress_tasks_snapshot.notes: Inventory now emits `source_run_id` + deterministic `canonical_run_id`; awaiting real data run
Ingestion supports `--run-id-mode`, writes `manifests/run_id_map.jsonl`, and now hardens missing/partial `asset_paths`; awaiting real data run
Validation now checks canonical run-ID shape and run directory/metadata ID consistency
Split script now enforces config fractions, respects `require_video`, validates `group_by_field`, and records dataset-manifest fingerprint

Added `scripts/train_interface_segmentation.py`, config `configs/modeling/family_a_segmentation_v1.json`, CLI `interact-morph segment-train`, and smoke QC artifact `smoke_family_a_segmentation_v1.qc.json`

Added `scripts/extract_contours_trajectories.py`, config `configs/modeling/family_a_contour_extraction_v1.json`, CLI `interact-morph extract-trajectories`, and smoke extraction report (`runs_written=3`)
Added `scripts/build_feature_qa_dashboard.py`, config `configs/modeling/family_a_feature_qa_v1.json`, CLI `interact-morph feature-qa`, and smoke QA report (`runs_scanned=3`, `runs_with_issues=0`)

Added `scripts/build_label_correction_queue.py`, config `configs/modeling/family_a_label_correction_v1.json`, docs `docs/modeling/LABEL_CORRECTION_WORKFLOW.md`, and CLI `interact-morph label-correction`; smoke queue artifact generated
Axisymmetric sweep planner now wired into executable corpus generation workflow (`scripts/plan_axisymmetric_sweep.py`)
DOE range config now exercised by planner plus surrogate execution path (`configs/simulations/family_a_axisymmetric_doe.json`)
